title: Moderation update: recent safety actions
body: Hi everyone — quick update from the mod team on recent safety actions. Over the last review cycle, we banned one account for posting clear phishing links across multiple channels, and issued a formal warning to another member for targeted harassment toward newcomers. We also received a high volume of reports regarding a core maintainer; after review, these were assessed as brigading-related false positives and no action was taken on that account. Please continue to report content that seems unsafe, hostile, or suspicious — your reports help us keep the space healthy. As always, if you believe a moderation action affecting you was made in error, you can appeal via the usual channels so another moderator can take a fresh look.
